treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient's neurological symptoms were most likely related to infection.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with somnolence, vomiting, and agitation.
Lovenox stopped and not to be bridged again in the future.
Tube feeds restarted when not bleeding.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with clinic to check INR and visiting nurse to check INR next.
patient_outcome.complications: Patient exhibited altered mental status with agitation and episodes of vomiting.
